Add New User

Enter multiple emails separated by commas for multi-account access. Email is required.
Leave blank to keep existing password when editing. Current password is shown above for reference.
Select which modules this user can access. Campaigns access is automatically determined by Google Account access. Todo module works automatically for all users. Package module is automatically available to Manager and Super Manager roles.
Select accounts... ▼
Loading reports...
ℹ️ Department-Based Access
When enabled, this user can add and edit users only within their own department. They will not be able to manage users from other departments.
ℹ️
Auto-Available Modules
Todo Module: Automatically available to all users. No configuration needed.
Package Module: Automatically available to Manager and Super Manager roles by default.
Select managers... ▼
Select one or more managers for this user. Tasks assigned to this user will be visible to all selected managers.
Select department(s)... ▼
Select one or more departments this user belongs to. Managers can be in multiple departments.
Select team members... ▼
Select users who will work under this user.
Select accounts... ▼
Access is controlled by the Google Account Module. If not enabled, no accounts will be accessible.
